title: Fix serializer method field hidden unique together (#9700)
body:
Fix: SerializerMethodField as HiddenField in unique_together

Corrects an issue where a SerializerMethodField that shares its name with a model field involved in a unique_together constraint (or UniqueConstraint) could be incorrectly treated as a HiddenField.

This typically occurred if the underlying model field was nullable or had a default value, and the SerializerMethodField was not being correctly prioritized during the uniqueness metadata processing.

The ModelSerializer.get_uniqueness_extra_kwargs method has been updated to ensure that if a field name corresponding to a model field in a uniqueness constraint is explicitly declared as a SerializerMethodField on the serializer, it is not converted into a HiddenField.

A test case has been added to tests/test_model_serializer.py (TestSerializerMethodFieldInUniqueTogether) to verify this behavior.

step_plan.summary: Fixes a bug where a SerializerMethodField that shares a name with a model field in a unique_together/UniqueConstraint could be incorrectly treated as a HiddenField. The changes ensure explicit SerializerMethodField declarations are preserved in the uniqueness kwargs generation flow, with targeted updates to related helper methods and accompanying tests.

steps.operation: Guard against HiddenField conversion in uniqueness kwargs when SerializerMethodField is explicitly declared
steps.reason: Ensure that if a field name participating in a unique constraint is declared as a SerializerMethodField on the serializer, it is not converted into a HiddenField during uniqueness metadata processing.
steps.side_effects: May affect tests around uniqueness handling; ensures explicit SerializerMethodField declarations are preserved. Potential ripple to related validators and field introspection logic.

steps.operation: Update model-field mapping to recognize SerializerMethodField declarations for unique constraint fields
steps.reason: Improve accuracy of which model fields are represented by serializer fields so that SerializerMethodField declarations for constrained fields are not misclassified as hidden fields.
steps.side_effects: Could impact field discovery logic; may necessitate updates to tests that rely on field introspection and mapping for unique constraints.

steps.operation: Adjust merging of extra_kwargs to respect SerializerMethodField declarations in unique constraints
steps.reason: When combining per-field kwargs, ensure that explicit SerializerMethodField declarations for fields involved in unique constraints are not overwritten or coerced by auto-generated HiddenField defaults.
steps.side_effects: Potential changes in how extra_kwargs interact with read_only/write_only semantics; needs tests to verify no regression for non-constraint fields.

steps.operation: Ensure get_extra_kwargs honors SerializerMethodField declarations for unique constraint fields
steps.reason: Maintain consistency across the kwargs generation pipeline so SerializerMethodField declarations are preserved through the full extra_kwargs resolution path.
steps.side_effects: Tests covering uniqueness and SerializerMethodField behavior may need updates; ensures consistent API behavior across all kwargs-related helpers.
